title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF TANZA, MUNICIPALITY OF TUGUEGARAO, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO TANZA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6091 / 62 OG No. 37, 6644 (September 12, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4417, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF TANZA, MUNICIPALITY OF TUGUEGARAO, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO TANZA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Tanza in the Municipality of Tuguegarao, Province of Cagayan, is hereby converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as Barrio Tanza.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
